name: /doctor warns when the repo contains files in a language with only partial rule coverage
command: mkdir -p repo && printf 'package main\n' > repo/main.go && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check coverage --root repo 2>out.txt && grep -q 'warning' out.txt && grep -q 'partial_coverage_language=go' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
